productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men White V-Brief
description: A hot winter collection from undercolors of benetton, this V-cut brief from Undercolors is crafted from a quick dry soft cotton fabric. The V-cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the embroidered label offers abrasion-free comfort. Crafted from 100% cotton Broad and stretchable waistband in that sits snug and comfortably Embroidered brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
